title: DSDS Extensions
description: Vendor-specific extensions for DSDS documents. This is an open object for tool-specific metadata that lives outside the core schema. Keys MUST use vendor-specific namespaces.

extensions.description: Vendor-specific extensions. Keys MUST use vendor-specific namespaces (reverse domain name notation is recommended) — at least two dot-separated segments, e.g. 'com.figma', 'acme.tooling'. The pattern is deliberately case-tolerant — vendors write reverse-domain namespaces as-is — unlike custom relation types, which use the stricter lowercase grammar. Tools that do not recognize an extension MUST keep it. Extension data SHOULD NOT duplicate core schema fields.
